page_content:
### **Email Template: Dr. Rita Patterson**
*(The Respected Advocate)*  
Subject: Thank You & Request for Updated Letter – [Your Name]  
Dear Dr. Patterson,  
I hope this message finds you well! I’ve been reflecting on our past correspondence and wanted to express my deep appreciation for your support during my medical school applications. Your letter made a significant difference in the process—especially when you noted how much I had grown since taking your course.  
As I continue advancing through my academic journey, I’d be honored if you could provide an updated version of your recommendation that reflects my recent work on [specific project or capstone]. This would help strengthen my application and honor the impact of your mentorship over time.  
If possible, I’d appreciate it if you could share a revised letter by [reasonable deadline], so I can submit it with my applications to TMDSAS/AMCAS. Please let me know if there’s anything specific about my recent work that would be helpful for you to include.  
Thank you once again for being such a respected advocate and mentor throughout my journey. Your support has been truly meaningful.  
With sincere gratitude,
[Your Full Name]
[Student ID/Program, if applicable]
[Contact Information]  
---
